title: fritillaria poluninii
intro: Fritillaria poluninii, a type of flowering plant, is a species of the lily family native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Fritillaria poluninii is believed to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are dried and processed into teas, tinctures, or capsules to utilize its medicinal properties and provide health benefits such as improved lung function and immune system support.
